message:
fix: resolve errcheck violations in cmd/bd/gitlab.go and gitlab_sync.go

Add explicit `_, _ =` assignments to suppress golangci-lint errcheck
findings for fmt.Fprintln/Fprintf return values (status output to
cmd.OutOrStdout()) and crypto/rand.Read (always returns nil on
supported platforms).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
